title: `define macro including `\`, `\`\`, and `` has issues for empty strings

features.name: macro with backtick concatenation and empty argument
features.description: Code should include a macro definition using backtick concatenation with an empty argument passed to the macro

features.name: macro string with escaped double quotes
features.description: Code should include a macro that produces a string with escaped double quotes using `\"...`\" syntax

features.name: backtick concatenation with empty macro definition
features.description: Code should include a backtick concatenation construct where the macro is defined to an empty string
